# mode

**Instance Property**

Specifies the display mode of the camera device view.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var mode: IKCameraDeviceViewDisplayMode { get set }
```

## Discussion

The possible values are listed in [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKCameraDeviceViewDisplayMode]

## View Display Mode

- **iconSize**: Specifies the icon size.
- **hasDisplayModeIcon**: Returns whether the device view is being displayed in icon mode.
- **hasDisplayModeTable**: Returns whether the device view is being displayed in table mode.
